Package oshi.benchmark

package oshi.benchmark
JMH benchmarks comparing JNA and FFM implementations of OSHI hardware and operating-system queries.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    oshi.benchmark.jmh_generated
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CpuTicksBenchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of CentralProcessor.getProcessorCpuLoadTicks().
    FileStoreBenchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of OSFileStore.updateAttributes().
    MemoryBenchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of GlobalMemory and VirtualMemory queries.
    NetworkIFBenchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of NetworkIF.updateAttributes().
    ProcessesBenchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of OperatingSystem.getProcesses().
